name: Substack
description: Read, search and manage Substack newsletters and posts. Browse publications, fetch articles, search content by keyword, and interact with the Substack reader platform.

tools_summary.name: get_publication
tools_summary.description: Get metadata about a Substack publication by subdomain

tools_summary.name: get_posts
tools_summary.description: List recent posts from a Substack publication

tools_summary.name: get_post
tools_summary.description: Fetch the full content of a specific Substack post

tools_summary.name: search_posts
tools_summary.description: Search posts within a Substack publication

tools_summary.name: get_authors
tools_summary.description: List authors of a Substack publication

setup_instructions: No API key required for reading public Substack content. The server uses Substack's public API. To access subscriber-only content, set SUBSTACK_COOKIE to your session cookie from browser dev tools.
_note: Substack does not have an official API. This MCP uses the public/reader API endpoints available without authentication.
